mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, author_url as authorUrl, cover_img as coverImg, views, favorites, category, tip, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM recipes WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipes WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')

SELECT id, title, author, author_url as authorUrl, cover_img as coverImg, views, favorites, category, tip, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM recipes WHERE cover_img != '' AND cover_img IS NOT NULL ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.title, r.author, r.author_url as authorUrl, r.cover_img as coverImg, r.views, r.favorites, r.category, r.tip, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt FROM recipes r INNER JOIN ingredients i ON r.id = i.recipe_id WHERE i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ingredient}, '%') ORDER BY r.views DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
